hero.subtitle: Exodus T.W.O empowers individuals facing mental health challenges, incarceration, addiction, and homelessness with real pathways to recovery.

about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: Exodus T.W.O (The Way Out) is a non-profit inspired by the Book of Exodus - drawing a parallel between the plights of ancient Israelites and individuals grappling with mental illness today. We offer a way out from the constraints caused by mental illness.
about.p2: Through collaboration with various stakeholders, we facilitate access to counseling, legal advocacy, employment opportunities, and community integration.
about.vision: A society where everyone receives compassionate support and equitable treatment.
about.mission: Breaking barriers and stigmas, offering a pathway to recovery for all.

services.name: Mental Health
services.desc: Counseling, crisis intervention, and resources for those with mental health disorders.

services.name: Addiction Recovery
services.desc: Root-cause treatment with counseling, group therapy, and recovery management.

services.name: Prison Programs
services.desc: Advocacy for incarcerated individuals - fair treatment and rehabilitation resources.

services.name: Homeless Support
services.desc: Resettlement assistance to rebuild lives with dignity and essential resources.

services.name: Youth Services
services.desc: Specialized programs for adolescent mental health and substance abuse.

services.name: Digital Equity
services.desc: Bridging the digital divide for underserved communities.

contact.map: 4245 N Central Expy, Ste 490 Dallas, TX 75205
